log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Githyanki — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Githyanki — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 168/178
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Githyanki — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Githyanki — Iron Concentration HP: 50/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Githyanki — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Githyanki — Iron Concentration HP: 29/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Githyanki — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Githyanki — Iron Concentration HP: 8/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Githyanki — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Githyanki — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Githyanki — Iron Concentration.
→ Githyanki — Iron Concentration healed for 6 HP. HP: 14/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Githyanki — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Githyanki — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
